{{Relic Infobox|Fresnel Lens|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Enchant|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Nimble|2}}
{{R|Fresnel Lens||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Drowning Beacon|2}} event. It adds Nimble 2 to future block cards.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Drowning Beacon|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Climb}} option and losing 13 Max HP. 

== Interactions ==

=== Synergies ===

* Cards that apply block multiple times, such as {{C|Evil Eye||2}}, {{C|Second Wind||2}},  {{C|Dodge and Roll||2}}, {{C|Glitterstream||2}},  and {{C|Death's Door||2}}, benefits from the Nimble enchantment each time block is applied.
* If {{M|Thieving Hopper||2}} steals an applicable card and is defeated, the returned card will gain Nimble.

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Fresnel Lens to the game.
